回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部研究所碩士班	112學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 文化細節創作 (The Details)	開課班級 : 建築碩一	學　　分 : 4.0	授課時數 : 4.0
授課教師 : 黃信穎	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
Being the third of three laboratory design-thinking programmes, i.e., the practices of cultural and military investigation, the historiography of the Southeast Asian architecture, and this -the study of details, this course expects from the students: 1, thinking in details, designing the details; and 2, doing the above in a sense of historics or historiography. The practices to achieve the above objectives will consist of: 1, to reconstruct and to completed the Catholic Chapel of the Kinmen-Matsu Apostolic Administration; 2, Cabanon of Ones Own; and 3, to well document (one of) the above practices. 


2.教學綱要
本課程學分數為4。選修需備有基本之Rhinoceros 3D知識與技巧，並需取得文化與軍事地警調查實務、東南亞建築史學學分（以上為碩班、大五生要求），或（學部大四）傳統建築測繪以具備基本之建築史學及知識與調查能力。3堂擇1，開學第一週課程說明時確認。本學期將操作之設計議題為：1、天主教金門、馬祖宗座署理區山外教堂（羅寶田設計）之3D模型復原及再設計，及2、個人小屋設計

The signing-ups are obligated to participated weekly studio works and present progresses for discussion. There will be two reviews (external and internal, or alternatively one external review and one NFT for sale) and one technical report to be accomplished before the end of the semester. Overall, this course includes 2 workshops. The semester are outlined below in sequence: first week, introduction and signing-up; 4 to 5 weeks of church design, another 4 to 5 weeks of cabanon design before final review.

6.成績評定及課堂要求
All signing-ups are required to present study results for final review (70%). NFTS shelfing or Mid-term review holds the 30% of the semester result. 
Those who are signing up this class is required to present their earlier curriculum for selection. Certain courses, e.g., The Practicals of Cultural and Military Landscape Investigation are necessary for signing-up. 
All signing-ups are required certain understandings upon Rhinoceros 3D, Grassharper and 3D Printing, together with design knowledge on architectural history and building construction.
